title: Jinbe Explains His Situation

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Huh?!! What's this crowd of people...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That treasure is mine!! I stole it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And I'm gonna take it back!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I've seen that face somewhere before... GRR.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A... A two hundred million bounty?!

summary: Jinbe Explains His Situation. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
